sessions.intent: Piece 5: Ingi-led code review and cleanup of pieces 1-4

before.assumptions: Pieces 1-4 (identity, crypto, signing, http) are complete and audited.
before.risk: Low — cleanup and polish, no new functionality.

sessions.plan: Ingi reviews the code personally and directs cleanup via coder.

actions.context: Branch and report setup for piece 5

after.health: Branch created. Ingi driving review, coder executing changes.

sessions.intent: Engine folder cleanup: Errors rename, TypeMapping/Types consolidation, dead code removal

before.risk: Low — rename, deduplication, dead code deletion.

sessions.plan: 1. Rename DataSourceError→SettingsError. 2. Consolidate TypeMapping/Types. 3. Delete unused PrParser.

after.notes: TypeMapping remains static for source generator. Types is the OBP instance API.

sessions.intent: Full 5-pass code analysis of cleanup branch changes

before.assumptions: ~244 files changed. Major patterns: [Provider] attribute, Data-typed params, event consolidation, convert deletion, dead code removal.
before.risk: Medium — large surface area, behavioral changes in identity/signing/http.

sessions.plan: 5-pass analysis: OBP compliance, simplification, readability, behavioral reasoning, deletion test.

actions.context: Full 5-pass analysis of all changed engine and module files

after.health: NEEDS WORK — 3 actionable findings, no OBP violations
after.notes: Channels disposal gap, Data.Name setter, 464 lines of untested code (PlangSerializer, DefaultAssertProvider, DefaultFileProvider)

sessions.intent: Re-review coder fix for Channels disposal

before.assumptions: Coder fixed finding 1 (Channels disposal). Findings 2-3 not addressed.

sessions.plan: Verify Channels disposal fix. Assess remaining findings.

actions.context: Verified Channels.DisposeAsync() added at correct position

after.health: PASS — fix correct, remaining findings are tester scope or low-priority
after.notes: Recommend tester next for coverage on PlangSerializer, DefaultAssertProvider, DefaultFileProvider

sessions.intent: Test quality analysis of cleanup branch — coverage, false greens, missing tests

before.assumptions: Codeanalyzer flagged coverage gaps in PlangSerializer, DefaultAssertProvider, DefaultFileProvider. ~160 changed production files.
before.risk: Medium — large cleanup with new actions, type changes, and behavioral changes.

sessions.plan: Run tests, collect coverage, hunt false greens in key modules, check new actions for coverage, verify step runner condition fix.

actions.context: Full test quality report with 8 findings
Tester session output: plan, summary, verdict

after.health: FAIL — 3 new actions (module.remove, list.set, event.skipAction) have zero tests
after.notes: 1839 C# tests pass. Signing/identity tests excellent. DefaultFileProvider 100% (codeanalyzer concern resolved). Recommend coder adds tests for 3 zero-coverage actions.

sessions.intent: Full blue+red team security audit of cleanup branch

before.assumptions: 642 files changed across signing, HTTP, identity, engine core, events, conditions, file, variable, list modules. Previous bots (codeanalyzer, tester) completed.
before.risk: Medium — large surface area, crypto changes, new module patterns.

sessions.plan: Phase 1 (Blue): Map attack surface across 9 areas. Phase 2 (Red): Exploit sketches. Phase 3: Write reports.

actions.context: Full security audit of all changed security-relevant files

after.notes: Two medium findings are contract violations (Decompress + DefaultEvaluator catch clauses). Third medium is accepted-risk nonce replay. Strong security posture overall. Suggest auditor next.
